content: Hey, I just read that Nexus Labs is switching to 100% renewable energy by 2025. Pretty impressive for a tech company our size.
That's great news! It's becoming more common for tech companies to make those commitments. Do you think it will affect your work at all?

Maybe a bit. I'm a Senior Software Engineer there, and we're already working on optimizing our data centers to reduce energy consumption. I've been tracking our power usage metrics for the past six months.
That sounds like valuable work. Are you personally involved in any environmental initiatives outside of work?

Actually, yes. I've been trying to reduce my own carbon footprint. I started a small vegetable garden on my apartment's balcony in San Diego last spring. Growing my own food has been surprisingly rewarding, and it's cut down on my grocery trips.
